llm_verdict.message:
</tool_call> tags.

We'll need multiple calls: first read_file, maybe conditionally write_file, then run_cmd.

But we cannot embed conditionals in the output; we just output the calls we intend to make. We'll assume file may not have the line; we will write_file.

Thus output three calls:

1. read_file with path "/etc/sysctl.d/user-namespaces.conf"

2. write_file with path "/etc/sysctl.d/user-namespaces.conf", content "user.max_user_namespaces = 0\n", mode "0644"

3. run_cmd with command "sysctl -w user.max_user_namespaces=0"

We need to follow format: each function call inside <function=...></function> block, and all inside a top-level <engineer></engineer>? Actually description: "When users ask questions, you MUST use the available tools... Reply ONLY in the following format with NO suffix: <engineer> ... </engineer>" Wait reading the system message: It says "You are the Remedy agent... You MUST use ONLY the provided tools: run_cmd, read_file, write_file.... If you choose to call a function ONLY reply in the following format with NO suffix: <function=example_function_name> ... </function>" Actually they gave a format for a single function call. But we need multiple calls; likely we can concatenate multiple <function> blocks. No outer wrapper needed. The example shows a single function call inside <function=...></function>. We'll output multiple such blocks sequentially.

Thus final answer:

<function=read_file>
<parameter=path>
/etc/sysctl.d/user-namespaces.conf
</parameter>
</function>
<function=write_file>
<parameter=path>
/etc/sysctl.d/user-namespaces.conf
</parameter>
<parameter=content>
user.max_user_namespaces = 0
</parameter>
<parameter=mode>
0644
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
sysctl -w user.max_user_namespaces=0
</parameter>
</function>

Make sure no extra text.


<function=read_file>
<parameter=path>
/etc/sysctl.d/user-namespaces.conf
</parameter>
</function>
<function=write_file>
<parameter=path>
/etc/sysctl.d/user-namespaces.conf
</parameter>
<parameter=content>
user.max_user_namespaces = 0
</parameter>
<parameter=mode>
0644
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
sysctl -w user.max_user_namespaces=0
</parameter>
</function>
